text:
Linux users searching for "smbmount" should find something.
What they want is the sharity-light port.
It might be nice if we explained how to search the ports, but we can't
do that *everywhere* it might be relevant...

Fix: [515] (lowellg) faq> diff -c book.sgml.ORIG book.sgml
